summary: RurAL CAP introduces the Community Action Resource Center, a service to support Alaskan organizations’ administrative, financial management, and other long-term, capacity-building needs. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 9, 2023
summary: March 9 2023: The sea ice has decreased since last week at a very small level of 0.40% , from the level on 03/02/2023 of 14.628 M km 2 to 14.569 M km 2 for this week. While that is not a large decrease, it really is the tipping point for the sea ice season. The week actually started with an initial...
